page_title: Ahmed Ehab | Online Coaching — Fat Loss & Muscle Building

i18n-text.mobile-nav.controls.lang-toggle.label: Language
i18n-text.hero.tag: Build Muscle. Lose Fat. Look Better.
i18n-text.problem.label: The Problem
i18n-text.problem.body: Because they don't know you. Your body is different, your schedule is different, your life is different. You need someone working with you — not a plan made for the average person.
i18n-text.problem.card1.title: Copy-Paste Programs
i18n-text.problem.card1.body: The same plan gets sold to thousands of people without anyone knowing your actual situation.
i18n-text.problem.card2.title: No Real Follow-Up
i18n-text.problem.card2.body: You start, then you stop — and nobody asks why or adjusts the plan with you.
i18n-text.problem.card3.title: Too Much Conflicting Info
i18n-text.problem.card3.body: Everyone tells you something different. You need an expert who looks at your specific case.
i18n-text.problem.card4.title: Hard to Stay Consistent
i18n-text.problem.card4.body: When the plan doesn't fit your schedule and lifestyle, it feels impossible from day one.
i18n-text.banner.quote: "The goal isn't just to change how you look — it's to build a stronger version of yourself."
i18n-text.how.label: How It Works
i18n-text.how.step1.title: Full Assessment
i18n-text.how.step1.body: I get to know your body, fitness level, goal, and daily routine — completely.
i18n-text.how.step2.title: Custom Plan
i18n-text.how.step2.body: A training and nutrition program built specifically around your body, goal, and lifestyle.
i18n-text.how.step3.title: Weekly Check-Ins
i18n-text.how.step3.body: I follow up consistently and adjust the plan based on your progress and any life changes.
i18n-text.how.step4.title: Real Results
i18n-text.how.step4.body: See a genuine, tangible difference in your body — and know how to maintain it.
i18n-text.offer.label: What You Get
i18n-text.offer.item1.title: A Plan Built Around Your Goal
i18n-text.offer.item1.body: Whether you want to lose fat, build muscle, or do both — the plan is built around your specific goal.
i18n-text.offer.item2.title: Flexible Meal Plan
i18n-text.offer.item2.body: You eat food you actually enjoy — no crash diets. The plan is updated regularly so you stay on track.
i18n-text.offer.item3.title: Video-Based Training Schedule
i18n-text.offer.item3.body: A complete workout program with video guidance — whether you train at the gym or at home.
i18n-text.offer.item4.title: Adjusted for Your Health Conditions
i18n-text.offer.item4.body: If you have any health considerations, the plan is adapted accordingly — your health is never at risk.
i18n-text.offer.item5.title: Progress Tracking & Evaluation
i18n-text.offer.item5.body: I measure your progress regularly and update the plan to keep you moving forward.
i18n-text.offer.item6.title: Daily WhatsApp Support
i18n-text.offer.item6.body: Any question, any time — you hear back from me directly, not a bot or an assistant.
i18n-text.offer.item7.body: If you need extra support, I can recommend the right supplements for your goal and budget.
i18n-text.results.label: Real Results
i18n-text.results.title: The Transformations Speak for Themselves

i18n-text.pricing.label: Online Coaching Plans
i18n-text.pricing.title: Coaching Plans Built for Real Results
i18n-text.pricing.body: Fair pricing for real follow-up and clear results.
i18n-text.pricing.plan1.name: 1 Month + 2 Weeks Free
i18n-text.pricing.plan2.name: 2 Months + 1 Month Free
i18n-text.pricing.plan3.name: 4 Months + 2 Months Free
i18n-text.pricing.note: Spots are limited to ensure follow-up quality
i18n-text.start.label: Get Started
i18n-text.start.title: How to Begin
i18n-text.start.body: 3 simple steps and we're on our way
i18n-text.start.step1.title: Choose Your Plan
i18n-text.start.step1.body: Browse the plans above and pick the one that fits your goal and budget
i18n-text.start.step2.title: Send the Payment
i18n-text.start.step2.body: Transfer the plan amount using any of the payment methods below
i18n-text.start.step3.title: Send the Receipt on WhatsApp
i18n-text.start.step3.body: After transferring, send me a photo of the receipt on WhatsApp and we start immediately

i18n-text.faq.label: FAQ
i18n-text.faq.title: Got a Question?
i18n-text.faq.q1: Is the program online or in a specific location?
i18n-text.faq.a1: The program is 100% online — no need to go anywhere. Everything happens over WhatsApp from anywhere in Egypt or abroad.
i18n-text.faq.a2: Not at all. The program adapts to your situation — gym, home, or anything else. What matters is commitment, not location.
i18n-text.faq.a3: Not at all. The plan is built around everyday home-cooked food, and we offer flexible alternatives that fit your budget so you reach your goal without extra costs.
i18n-text.faq.a4: In the first two weeks you'll notice a difference in energy and performance. Visible body changes typically come from week four, as the body needs time to respond.
i18n-text.faq.q5: What if I have a tight schedule?
i18n-text.faq.a5: That's exactly what personalized coaching solves — I design the plan around your actual schedule, not some ideal person's schedule that doesn't exist.
i18n-text.faq.q6: What makes you different from other coaches?
i18n-text.faq.a6: You're talking to Ahmed directly — not an assistant, not a bot. I work with a limited number of clients so I can give you the time and attention you actually deserve.
i18n-text.faq.q7: Can I start with no experience?
i18n-text.faq.a7: Absolutely. The starter plan is designed for complete beginners. The most important thing is showing up ready to commit — the rest you'll learn along the way.
i18n-text.cta.label: Next Step
i18n-text.cta.body: Every day you wait is another day further from the body you want. One message on WhatsApp and we start working together.
i18n-text.cta.whatsapp-note: Reply within hours · No commitment required
i18n-text.nav.social.title: Stay Connected
